main_post.text:
🔍 GitHub-Account-Scanner v0.2.0 Released

A major architecture refresh: from Python polling to Worker-first.

📦 What Changed:
• Migrated to Cloudflare Worker runtime
• Real-time webhook delivery (no more polling!)
• GitHub App signature verification
• Test/Production profile separation
• AgentAGI explainer prompt auto-routing

🔄 New Flow:
GitHub App → Cloudflare Worker → Discord Bot API

💡 Key Improvement:
Release notifications now trigger AgentAGI explainer workflows automatically when mentions are configured.

$ONIAGI
